description.value: > Fur Associated Domain: Animal. Replacement Power: The following granted power replaces the speak with animals power of the Animal domain. Predatorâs Grace (Su): You can, as a swift action, grant yourself a +10-foot bonus to your base speed for 1 round. This bonus increases by 5 feet for every 5 cleric levels you possess. In addition, you gain low-light vision for 1 round. If you already possess low-light vision, the range of your sight becomes three times that of a human in dim light for 1 round. You can use this ability a number of times per day equal to 3 + your Wisdom modifier. Replacement Domain Spells: 1stâ magic fang, 3rdâ beast shape I (animals only).
